name: Poster Rotator
description: Fill a local poster pool per movie from providers, then periodically rotate the Primary Poster image from the pool. This keeps Jellyfin looking fresh with rotating poster images on an interval of your choosing.

versions.changelog: Compatibility: targets Jellyfin 12.0.0.0 beta while keeping plugin version 1.7.0.0. Scheduler: renames the main task to Rotate pools while keeping the stable PosterRotator.RotatePostersTask key. Packaging: includes meta.json and a local plugin image for manual zip installs. Performance: processes randomized library item ids in batches, uses selected library parent ids when available, defers pool index writes during scheduled runs, caches diagnostics briefly, respects cooldowns, and allows MaxRotationsPerRun=0 as no per-run rotation cap. Interface: keeps Pools as the default tab, fixes pool image previews with ApiKey URLs, adds a Jellyfin library dropdown, and adds configurable language fallback controls.

Compatibility: target Jellyfin 10.11.0.0 for the full 10.11.x line. Security: bounded image downloads, safer URL validation, safe purge, and serialized rotation/purge operations. Performance: plugin-data pool storage with migration from media-folder .poster_pool directories and Jellyfin SaveImage rotation.
